70010000115798.description:
From the hero and enemies to the blocks, BGM, and sound effects—
everything in this game is made from the developer (me): live-action images and real voice.
A sanity-questioning 2D action platformer has arrived.

[WARNING] The claimed clear rate is 0.000000000000000001%.
We take no responsibility for any regret after purchase.

■ "All-Me" materials, in full madness
The player, attacking enemies, and even the platforms are all live-action images of the developer.
Jump sounds, damage sounds, and the BGM are also made entirely from the developer's "voice."
Enjoy the deranged artwork that shaves away your sanity the longer you play.

■ Unreasonably "ultra-high difficulty"
Gotcha traps, nasty enemy placements, and strict control precision.
It follows the classic die-and-learn style of old-school "die games."
Even the developer struggles to clear it—can you endure it?

■ Friendship-destroying "2-player co-op"
Supports local 2-player co-op by sharing a controller.
But it's not normal co-op.
If either player makes a mistake: instant game over—collective responsibility.
Shove each other off tiny platforms, fall, blame your partner… pure chaos.

Now—don't give up. Overcome "me."
70010000115798.intro:
Dev-made live-action everything
Brutal die-and-retry (0.00…1% clear)
2-player co-op: one mistake = game over for both
70010000115798.name: All Me Action Game

70010000117759.description:
Inspired by classics, Wrack is an arcade-style FPS. Mow down enemies one after another, and become more powerful the more you kill. Amass a deadly arsenal, discover secret powers... and save your world!

In this remake of 2014's Wrack, play as Kain as you shoot, slash, and hyperblast your way through a horde of invading aliens and robots to keep your planet safe.

KEY FEATURES: 
- Kill Streaks: Rack up kill after kill to earn a kill streak! The more damage you pump into an enemy, the more extreme its death, and the more time you have to keep your streak going.
- Resets: Kill enemies a second time by exploding their corpse into giblets to reset your timer! Use your current weapon(s), or your melee attack to slice a corpse to bits.
- Fast Movement: Use your fast movement speed and abilities, like a super jump, to evade enemy attacks, and find secrets and treasure!
- Bosses: When you're done racking up a huge kill streak, duke it out with minibosses and bosses... and put your skills to the test!
70010000117759.intro: You are the only one stopping an alien invasion... and loving every second of it!
70010000117759.name: Wrack: Reclamation

70010000116084.description:
Get your brain ready and sharpen your curiosity in Do You Really Know?, a charming quiz game where every correct answer is a step toward the top of the Owls’ Tower of Knowledge. It starts easy, but don’t be fooled. The higher you climb, the tougher the questions become.

With each streak of correct answers, you advance through the tower’s floors and earn points to exchange for helpful power-ups. They give you that extra push when challenges get tricky and can make all the difference at critical moments. Made a mistake? No problem. You return to the preparation area, take a breath, and try again, now a little wiser.

With cute visuals, a relaxed atmosphere, and questions that test general knowledge without pressure, Do You Really Know? is perfect for players who enjoy smart quizzes, quick sessions, and the satisfying feeling of learning while playing.
70010000116084.intro: Do You Really Know? Climb the Tower of Knowledge
70010000116084.name: Do You Really Know?

70010000116455.description:
Welcome to 1 CatLine, a brainteasing precision platformer where you must guide a daring and adventurous heroine through single-screen challenges, with 50 unique levels spanning a variety of colorful pixel art biomes.

Run and leap through increasingly complex stages, freezing time and shifting perspectives to maneuver your cat friend around the environment to push crates, activate switches or create improvised platforms using its long furry body! Are you clever enough to clear all the challenges?

• Traverse increasingly complex platforming stages.
• Use your feline companion to form improvised platforms and push objects.
• Freeze time mid-air and maneuver your cat buddy to avoid pitfalls.
• Activate switches in the correct order to toggle barriers.
• Enjoy 50 levels of brainteasing retro goodness.
70010000116455.intro: Master puzzling stages with the help of your 2D feline companion!
70010000116455.name: 1 CatLine

70010000081851.description:
Embark on a tranquil journey to uncharted waters in Collector’s Cove, a farming adventure set on the high seas! There are no enemies in this world: it’s just you, your animal friend, and an ocean full of secrets and surprises.

Grow a flourishing floating farm. Cultivate rare crops and reel in elusive fish. Discover new islands and climate zones, each with its own collection of unique local flora. Fill in your Collector’s Compendium. Craft items and personalize your ship, transforming it into your own home. Learn how to gather enough rare crops and fish; you might even rise to the ultimate rank: Named-Collector!

Best of all, you don’t journey alone. Your animal friend will come along for the ride! Strengthen your bond, customize her with accessories, unlock new interactions, and grow together as you venture onwards!

Features:

Farm: Cultivate your own farm on the deck of a ship, surrounded by the open sea!

 Discover: Sail across uncharted waters and forage on unseen islands!

Collect: Find rare crops and fish on your quest to fill in every page of the Collector’s Compendium!

Befriend: Forge a bond and customize your trusty animal friend who can lend a fin whenever needed!

Personalize: Craft useful items from foraged materials and transform your boat into your own home!
70010000081851.name: Collector's Cove

70010000097339.description:
Step into the life of a self-proclaimed detective. Along with your quirky assistant Olivina, take on a seemingly ordinary case, until you unravel its hidden twists and turns that pull you through a thrilling, unique story. 

Game Features: 
• Unique investigation gameplay that challenges players to be observant 
• Diverse cast of characters 
• Smooth 2D animation that breathes life into the characters 
• Stylized, hand-drawn CG for players to unlock and collect
70010000097339.intro: Embark on a thrilling detective visual novel with your quirky assistant, Olivina, featuring unique investigations and a diverse cast of characters.
70010000097339.name: Memory Rewind

70010000098354.description:
From the creators of Teacup, Bubblegum Galaxy is a cozy narrative building game about rebuilding the galaxy by designing planets. Relax as you create colorful planets or spend hours trying to get a perfect score!

BECOME A PLANET ARCHITECT
Your small but trusty computer will allow you to design planets by placing tiles. To create efficient planets, the software will suggest missions such as connecting similarly colored tiles or a specific number of trees. Each planet has its own quirks and special rules you will have to master to do your best work yet!

BEFRIEND YOUR CO-WORKERS
In-between planet designing sessions, you'll be free to roam the office, inspect your surroundings and chat with your co-workers. Encounter hundreds of unique story events as you get to know this quirky cast of characters.

DISCOVER WHO DELETED THE GALAXY
The day you started your internship the inter-dimensional universe server crashed for "unknown reasons", deleting the entirety of the Bubblegum galaxy. If you prove your skill as a planet architect you just might find out the truth behind why the galaxy was deleted...
70010000098354.name: Bubblegum Galaxy

70010000099764.description:
Zumba – Galactic Marble Blast propels you into a vibrant sci-fi universe where you, a brave spacefrog, must fend off waves of rolling marbles—and occasionally rogue planets—before they vanish into the void. Select a star system, position your frog-powered cannon at the screen’s center, and launch colorful marbles or planets along winding orbital paths. Match three or more identical spheres to trigger spectacular explosions, pause the advance, and rack up combos for massive scores.
Earn up to three stars on each level by clearing all spheres before they cross the event horizon. Every ten levels, you warp into a new galaxy with unique challenges: the glowing Nebula Gardens, the rocky Asteroid Belts, the swirling Quantum Vortex, and the perilous Black Hole Citadel. Each galaxy introduces new marble colors, curved gravitational paths, floating obstacles, and ever-increasing speeds—keeping the cosmic challenge fresh and exhilarating.
70010000099764.intro: Leap across the cosmos—match, blast, and save the galaxy in marble style!
70010000099764.name: Zumba - Galactic Marble Blast

70010000104926.description:
This game is a drone simulation game that allows you to experience real drone flight based on footage shot by a real flying drone. 
There is no up, down, left or right direction control, only the control to increase or decrease the drone speed. 
You can also change the drone's flight mode from Normal, Sport, and Eco to any of the 3. 

Enjoy the beautiful scenery of Daedunsan, Korea with "Real" footage! 
There are a total of 3 flight courses in 2 areas.
 high-definition footage faithfully reproduces the atmosphere of real nature, providing a strong sense of immersion in the game. 
Smooth and realistic video playback makes you feel like you are a real drone pilot. 
Large capacity! You can fly to locations that show the beautiful scenery of Korea! 
Two play modes are supported: course-specific flying mode and view mode automatic flight. There is also an achievement system. 
Visit Korea from home at any time! 
Enjoy the drone flight control experience and the beautiful natural scenery.
70010000104926.name: Korean Drone Flying Tour Daedunsan

70010000106507.description:
EVOLVE YOUR BEASTS!
Bean Beasts gain experience, evolve and unlock additional attacks. 

USE POWERFUL ABILITIES!
Each Beast comes with a unique special ability and secondary attack. 

UPGRADE YOUR TRAPS!
Choose the path to best suit your strategy.

RE-PATH YOUR FOES!
Use walls to redirect enemies however you see fit.

Game Features:
- 10 unique Bean Beasts, each with 3 evolution stages.
- 12 unique Traps, each with 2 upgrade paths.
- 21 individual player-triggered abilities, including 5 summons.
- 40 hand-crafted levels spanning 5 biomes.
- 8 epic boss encounters.
- Plus 8 endless mode maps.
- A new Beast, Trap or Upgrade unlocked after every level.
- 4 difficulty options - from beginner to beast mode.
- Over 50 different enemies to challenge your tactical skills.
- 2 damage types, 5 damage elements and 7 status effects.
- Use of physics and gravity to shove your opponents.
- Custom music, artwork and juicy sound effects.
70010000106507.intro: Defeat monster hordes alongside your Bean Beasts in this cute, challenging Tower Defense Game! Evolve your companions, explore upgrade paths for traps and take on epic boss battles!
70010000106507.name: Bean Beasts

70010000106676.description:
Turn numbers into works of art! 
Choose from over 120 designs, color in each section, and marvel as vibrant images appear before your very eyes. Whether animals, landscapes or artistic designs, experience the perfect escape as you paint. 

• Draw intuitively with your finger – control all your actions directly via the touchscreen, with no additional devices required

• Suitable for any talent level – a range of difficulty levels are available from the first brushstroke to the finished masterpiece 

• Personalize your work – experiment with 8 color palettes and 8 unique painting styles to produce wildly different results 
 
• Smart drawing aids – highlight fields, show/hide numbers, or automatically jump to the next area  

• Flexible painting – you can start a picture, take a break and then resume painting whenever you feel like it 

• Admire your gallery – use time-lapse mode to look back at how your artworks were created
70010000106676.name: CreArt – Painting by Numbers

70010000107463.description:
Welcome to the Ultimate Parkour Game!

Welcome to Parkour Labs, a vaporwave-inspired parkour game.
Surf the waves of nostalgia and retro aesthetics, sliding down ramps and performing smooth turns.
Explore colorful and surreal landscapes inspired by the culture, music, and art of the 80s and 90s.
Collect glitch effects and artifacts to unlock new levels and secrets.
Experience the synthwave atmosphere in this unique and original game that challenges your mouse control and movement skills.
70010000107463.intro: Think you're a parkour master? Prove it!
70010000107463.name: Parkour Labs

70010000113718.description: The veggies have snapped! Blast through endless waves of enraged carrots, onions, and mutant tomatoes in this fast-paced rogue-like FPS. Collect upgrades, unlock new arenas, and survive the Feast of Fury — where dinner fights back!
70010000113718.intro: Enter the warzone against furious killer vegetables!
70010000113718.name: Veggie Warfare – Feast of Fury

70010000114122.description:
The Hidden Cats are back to explore the whispers and shadows of the mysterious Spooky Village!

Find over 1200 hidden objects across 12 levels, collect special cards, and discover real-life cats shared by our Hidden Cats community!

Game Features:
- 1200+ hidden objects, 12 unique levels with unlockables
- Collectible cards, achievements, secrets to discover
- Hand-drawn art & original soundtrack with dynamic sound effects
70010000114122.intro: Seek the whiskers in the dark... Find the cats in the Spooky Village!
70010000114122.name: Hidden Cats in Spooky Village

70010000114256.description:
Step into the chaotic world of Ultra Bonk Survivors, where every swing, spell, and explosion decides your fate!

Choose your hero, dive into monster-filled arenas, and unleash devastating attacks in this fast-paced survivor-style action roguelite designed for quick, addictive sessions of pure fun.

Game features:
- Bonk, Slash, and Survive!
- Face endless waves of goblins, skeletons, and demons in vibrant fantasy arenas that crumble and glow with magical energy.
- Every run is a fight to last just a little longer—and bonk a little harder.
- Unlock Heroes & Legends
- Begin your adventure with humble warriors and unlock mighty heroes as you progress, including the legendary Lion Knight, masters of sword and shield.
- Each character brings unique stats and attack styles to discover.
- Grow Stronger Every Run
- Collect glowing orbs, relics, and mystical books that grant random power-ups. Experiment with different builds and create unstoppable synergies.
- Explore and Interact
- Find shrines, treasure chests, and mysterious power-ups scattered across the battlefield.
  
Will you risk everything to open a chest in the middle of a horde?
One More Bonk...
Fast-paced, endlessly replayable, and dangerously addictive. Every defeat brings you closer to your next unlock and new surprises.

Check out this fun new game from the NOSTRA.GAMES team.

Ultra Bonk Survivors is your ticket to the ultimate fantasy survival experience.

Choose your hero, charge into the temple ruins, and see how long you can survive the bonkocalypse.
70010000114256.intro: Epic fantasy survival – bonk your way to Glory!
70010000114256.name: Ultra Bonk Survivors

70010000115503.description:
An evil Necromancer has brought ruin upon an already dangerous island.

It's up to Rynna to fight her way through hordes of monsters and undead beings, and defeat the Necromancer and his minions and free the souls of those who have been trapped in the world of the living.

Find Weapons and Artifacts, explore the 20 zones, each dividing into multiple caves and dungeons. Help the people by finding their possessions and freeing their souls.


Shalnor: Silverwind saga 2 mixes 2D sprites with a 3D terrain, giving it a unique look, the game features quick and swift movement that makes fighting hordes of monsters fun.

Featuring 15 unique Items/Weapons that accommodates different playstyles and adds a lot of variation to combat.
70010000115503.intro: An epic RPG/Action Adventure game. With focus on gauntlet-style combat, traps, boss fights and beautiful pixel-art scenery.
70010000115503.name: Shalnor: Silverwind Saga 2

70010000115527.description:
Get ready for intergalactic barking and clever strategy in Collie Call: The Future Is Calling. Here, you control a robotic dog in outer space on a very unusual mission: organize floating sheep into air-bubble pastures before chaos takes over the galaxy.

Each stage is a smart puzzle where every push matters. Teleporters flash, buttons activate futuristic gates, and every move can mean the difference between a perfect solution or a sheep stuck in the wrong corner of the universe. Plan carefully, test routes, use undo without fear, and refine your strategy until everything clicks into place.

With 30 levels full of progressive challenges, charming sci-fi visuals, and accessible mechanics, Collie Call blends logic, cuteness, and technology into an engaging experience. It is the perfect puzzle for players who enjoy thinking calmly, experimenting with creative solutions, and celebrating that satisfying feeling of getting everything just right.

The future is calling. And it needs a good dog.
70010000115527.intro: Collie Call: Sheep Mission in Space
70010000115527.name: Collie Call: The Future Is Calling

70010000116571.description:
Welcome to a private spa where relaxation isn’t the only thing in the air.

In Spa Massage Girls: Love & Relax, you’ll enjoy soothing massage minigames while getting to know a group of charming girls through lighthearted, flirty conversations. Every interaction brings you closer to unlocking new scenes, reactions, and special moments.

Balance calm hands with smart choices as you learn what each girl enjoys, how she responds to your moves, and when to push… or slow things down.

Relax, connect, and let the atmosphere do the rest.


FEATURES:

● Minigames in the spa: Simple, satisfying gameplay focused on timing, precision, and relaxation.

● Interactive conversations: Choose your answers and discover how each girl reacts to your style.

● Unlockable images and moments: Progress through each route to reveal exclusive content.

● Different personalities: From sweet and shy to confident and teasing, every girl feels unique.

● Multiple outcomes: Your performance and decisions shape each experience.


Can you find the perfect balance between relaxation and romance?

Step into the spa and enjoy the experience at your own pace. 
Are you ready?
70010000116571.intro:
Gentle touches. 
Playful flirting. 
Pure relaxation.
70010000116571.name: Spa Massage Girls: Love & Relax

70010000116577.description:
Welcome to an exclusive spa where relaxation comes with chemistry.

In Spa Massage Boys: Love & Relax, you’ll meet confident, charming guys ready to unwind with you. Enjoy satisfying massage-themed minigames while building attraction through playful conversations and bold choices.

Each guy has his own vibe, from confident and teasing to calm and mysterious. Learn what makes them relax, discover their reactions, and unlock special moments as you progress.

Keep your focus, read the mood, and let the connection grow.


FEATURES:

● Massage-based minigames focused on timing and precision.

● Flirty, choice-driven conversations.

● Unlockable images and exclusive scenes.

● Different personalities and story routes.

● Multiple endings depending on your performance and decisions.


Can you handle the heat behind closed doors?

Step into the spa, take a deep breath… and see where the tension leads.

Are you ready?
70010000116577.intro:
Strong hands. 
Playful tension. 
Total relaxation.
70010000116577.name: Spa Massage Boys: Love & Relax

70010000116655.description:
Just like in the first game, you’ll find very simple puzzles and pleasant music. Relax as you assemble beautiful images. 
Fierce barbarians, wise mages, brave paladins, and many other heroines are waiting for you!
70010000116655.intro: The second installment of the fantasy puzzle series.
70010000116655.name: Anime: Fantasy Uni 2

70010000117777.description:
“Where is ◯?” is a simple, satisfying brain-teaser:
Just spot the target character hidden among a screen full of scattered letters and tap it.

You’ll encounter Hiragana, the English alphabet, Hangul, and Traditional Chinese characters.
The more unfamiliar characters mix in, the more your focus and observation skills get tested!

Quick to play in short bursts, yet perfectly warming for the brain.
Ignore distractions like shape, size, color, and placement—trust your eagle eyes and claim the correct answer.
70010000117777.intro:
Find the ONE specified character!
Search across Hiragana, English letters, Hangul, and Traditional Chinese!
70010000117777.name: Quick Brain Letter Hunt

70010000117922.description:
The Story:

Long ago, the kingdom thrived—ringed by vast forests, towering mountains, and tranquil seas. From its high walls, the great castle watched over a peaceful people… until the night Death rode through the gates on a black horse.

It passed silently through the streets, and ruin followed in its wake. Fire spread, plague consumed the weak, and despair swallowed the living. By dawn, the cries had faded, the streets were filled with the fallen, and a terrible curse had taken hold.

Since that day, the kingdom has lived under a broken pact. Every ten years, a chosen soul must descend into the darkness in the hope of ending the curse.

A secret council now prepares the ritual once more, forging a magical six-sided die—an artifact said to shape fate itself. The newly chosen knight rides toward the ten forbidden dungeons, where shadows cling to ancient stone… and deep within, the monsters wait.

The Game:

DecaDungeons™ is a first-person, turn-based dungeon crawler that blends classic DRPG mechanics with a minimalistic, atmospheric 3D pixel-art style.

Descend through ten deadly dungeons, battle powerful foes, and uncover the secrets needed to save the kingdom. Exploration is just as important as survival—hidden throughout the labyrinths are 50 Red Coins, waiting for those who search carefully.

Rare Monsters:

Some encounters carry a 1 in 100 chance to spawn a rare, rainbow-colored monster. These elusive foes grant massive rewards in EXP and gold. Few have seen them—will you be one of the lucky few?

Events:

While exploring, you’ll encounter special events—short scenarios that present three possible choices. Each decision carries risk or reward. Choose wisely… luck does not always favor the bold.

The Council Has Spoken:

The fate of the realm now rests in the hands of the dice-wielding knight.
Will you break the curse… or watch the kingdom fall into darkness?

Key Features:

10 unique, trap-filled dungeons

First-person, turn-based combat

50 hidden Red Coins to discover

Rare monsters with massive EXP and gold rewards

Random events with branching outcomes

Atmospheric 3D pixel-art environments
70010000117922.intro: DecaDungeons™ is a first-person, turn-based dungeon crawler where fate is decided by a magical six-sided dice. Explore 10 deadly dungeons, battle fierce foes, hunt monsters, and survive!
70010000117922.name: DecaDungeons™

70010000118846.description:
UFOPHILIA is a first-person psychological horror game where you explore areas marked by alien phenomena. Use specialized equipment to detect, identify, and photograph aliens, but do so at your own risk... They are watching you too.

Equipped with advanced tools, your mission is to detect, identify, and photograph extraterrestrials, each encounter involving unique behaviors and unpredictable dangers.

Each mission is different: spawn areas, alien types, and phenomena are constantly changing. Some aliens are hostile, others are curious or even playful, but they are all watching you. 

Features

- Atmospheric horror with unpredictable dynamic encounters.
- Nine alien types with distinct behaviors, reactions, and weaknesses.
- Specialized investigation tools, such as EMF detectors, night vision, and more.
- Real device synergies that enhance gameplay when tools are combined.
- Roswell point system to unlock upgrades, new tools, and missions.
- High replayability with random alien appearances and mission outcomes.
- Multiple endings and performance ranks, from “Forum Conspiracy Theorist” to “Roswell Agent".
70010000118846.intro: Not all visitors come in peace.
70010000118846.name: UFOPHILIA

70010000118964.description:
Rooster Saga is a fast-paced arcade game focused on timing, reflexes, and precision.

Tap to keep the rooster airborne, avoid endless obstacles, and survive for as long as possible. Every mistake ends the run instantly.

Easy to learn but hard to master, Rooster Saga is built for quick sessions and constant retries, where skill is the only thing that matters.

Compete on global leaderboards, compare your scores with other players, and push yourself to fly farther with every attempt.

Whether you play for a minute or an hour, each run challenges your focus and reaction speed.

There are no upgrades, power-ups, or shortcuts. Success depends entirely on your timing and control.

Perfect for arcade fans, score chasers, and players who enjoy simple mechanics with a tough challenge.
70010000118964.intro:
Tap to fly. 
Dodge obstacles. 
Chase high scores.
70010000118964.name: Rooster Saga: I Believe I Can Fly

70010000119014.description:
Perfect for when you’re thinking, “I want a quick dose of mystery!”
Each puzzle is a simple one-question, one-answer challenge.

You’ll face strange little moments hidden in everyday life—
odd details and puzzling events that make you tilt your head.

Read the story, sort out the situation, and reach the one true answer.

Controls are simple:
When you’ve got it, just tap the part you think is the answer.

That “Aha!” moment is addictive.
Use your observation and imagination to unravel every mystery!
70010000119014.intro:
One-minute spark, satisfying payoff!
A collection of bite-sized mysteries you can solve in no time.
70010000119014.name: Quick Deduction Short Mysteries

70010000119461.description:
Six Seven Nights is a compact first-person survival horror focused on investigation, atmosphere, and escalating tension.

You are sent to a school locals openly call cursed. It has been closed for months after a chain of unexplained incidents and growing panic in the surrounding area. Strange sightings, nightly disturbances, and psychological breakdowns are all tied to the building — or so people believe.

With fear spreading and pressure mounting, authorities decide on a simple solution: demolish the school. Your employer disagrees.

According to the Bureau, destroying the building won't end the phenomenon — it may make it far worse. You are sent in to prevent a disaster before it's too late.

The game unfolds across six playable nights. Each night:
• expands the accessible areas of the school
• introduces new paranormal behavior
• increases pressure and unpredictability

You explore a damaged, partially collapsed building, clearing debris, opening sealed rooms, and uncovering clues through environmental storytelling, notes, and strange markings scattered throughout the school. There is no combat — survival depends on observation, timing, and understanding how the environment responds to your actions.

A persistent hostile presence roams the school and reacts dynamically. Some actions draw attention. Others reduce it. Learning the difference is part of surviving.

Between nights, you receive calls from a Bureau specialist who helps contextualize what you're dealing with — offering guidance without direct answers. The truth is never handed to you.

You have six nights because the seventh day is irreversible.
If you fail, demolition won't erase what's here — it will unleash it.

Features:
• First-person survival horror with a unique combat system
• Six-night structure with escalating tension
• One evolving location that changes with progress
• Environmental puzzles inspired by classic horror
• A reactive entity that responds to player behavior
• Heavy focus on atmosphere, sound, and observation

The school is not just a location.
It's a problem that's running out of time.
70010000119461.intro: You have six nights. The seventh day changes everything.
70010000119461.name: Six Seven Nights

70010000120490.description:
Speed Boom: Last Delivery is a high-speed arcade experience built around one thing — momentum.

Dash across a vibrant neon city, wall-run between skyscrapers, chain jumps across rooftops, and deliver packages as fast as humanly possible. Every second counts. Every shortcut matters. Every mistake costs you time.

Take on 40 time-based deliveries and push for the ultimate S+ rank. The faster you move, the better the reward. Master the routes, optimize your path, and chase your personal best.

Earn coins through perfect runs and exploration. Upgrade your runner’s speed, acceleration, and movement to break your limits. Unlock a variety of skins and express your style while dominating the streets.

The city is fully explorable and packed with hidden graffiti waiting to be discovered. Find them, repaint them with your own mark, and turn the streets into your playground.

Designed for replayability and built with flow in mind, Speed Boom: Last Delivery is speedrun-friendly and rewards skill, precision, and mastery.

No brakes. No limits. Just speed.
70010000120490.intro:
Built for Speed.
Designed for Records.
Speedrun Friendly.
70010000120490.name: Speed Boom: Last Delivery

70050000067964.description:
Celebrate your support of Collector's Cove with this exclusive Supporter Pack! 

It includes three unique cosmetic items:
- A crown for your animal companion
- A tiara for your animal companion
- A jester cap for your character

These cosmetics are designed to make your animal companion even more majestic, while you'll be able to bring a touch of humor to the court!

They are only available in this pack, as a special thank-you to players who are helping support Collector's Cove even further.
70050000067964.name: Collector's Cove Supporter Pack

70050000070156.description:
This set includes new dungeons, cards, a Muse, and a Random Event related to the Blaster Master Zero series.
Clear the first new dungeon and you'll be able to use the new cards and Muse, as well as trigger the Random Event, in other dungeons.
70050000070156.name: Card-en-Ciel DLC - The World of the "Blaster Master Zero Series"

70070000031744.description:
Three complete anime romance games. One charming collection.

This bundle brings together Yandere Anime Girlfriend: The Mean Waifu Sim, Cozy Earth: Hawaii Island Love Anime GIRLS, and K-pop Idols Dating: Anime Love, offering three different anime inspired romance experiences focused on charm, personality, and connection.

Meet expressive anime girls with very different attitudes. Some are sweet and relaxed, others confident and intense, and others shine with idol-like charisma. 

Each game invites you into a distinct setting, from tropical islands to stylish pop culture scenes, where conversations and choices shape every interaction.

Progress through light visual novel gameplay, unlock new moments, and discover how each girl reacts as you get closer. 

Attraction builds over time, personalities unfold naturally, and every experience offers its own tone and rhythm.

Whether you enjoy cozy romance, playful tension, or glamorous anime dating, this bundle delivers hours of engaging anime love stories at a reduced price.

Three games.
Three styles of romance.
One bundle to enjoy.

Play now!
70070000031744.intro:
Three anime romances.
One irresistible bundle.
Which girl will catch your heart?
70070000031744.name: Anime Romance Collection: 3 Game Bundle

70070000031745.description:
Three complete anime romance games. One charming collection.

This bundle brings together Yandere Anime Boyfriend: A Day with Your Husbando Sim, Cozy Earth: Hawaii Island Love Anime BOYS, and K-pop Idols Dating: Anime Love for B.SeveT, offering three different anime-inspired romance experiences centered on charm, personality, and emotional connection.

Meet expressive anime boys with very different attitudes. Some are calm and affectionate, others confident and intense, and others shine with idol like charisma that draws you in from the first encounter.

Each game takes you to a distinct setting, from relaxing tropical islands to stylish pop culture scenes, where conversations and choices shape every interaction.

Progress through light visual novel gameplay, unlock new moments, and discover how each boy reacts as your bond grows stronger.

Attraction develops over time, personalities unfold naturally, and every experience offers its own tone and rhythm.

Whether you enjoy cozy romance, playful tension, or glamorous anime dating, this bundle delivers hours of engaging anime love stories at a reduced price.

Three games.
Three styles of romance.
One bundle to enjoy.

Play now!
70070000031745.intro:
Three anime romances.
One irresistible bundle.
Which boy will steal your heart?
70070000031745.name: Anime Romance Boys Collection: 3 Game Bundle

70070000032813.description:
The Supporter Edition is for those who want to support the developers of Collector's Cove even further!
Please know that we are incredibly grateful for your support. Thank you very much!

This edition includes the full game, two royal cosmetics for your animal companion – to give them an extra majestic look – and a matching jester cap to customize your character – perfect to keep their majesty entertained.
70070000032813.name: Collector's Cove Supporter Edition

70010000108110.description:
Build and manage your own geeky supermarket in Weeb Store Simulator: Supermarket Together, a fun and chaotic store management simulator where games, manga, and collectibles rule the shelves!

Start small with a humble shop and grow it into a bustling paradise for gamers and anime fans. Stock video games and consoles, organize manga and comics, display figurines and toys, and keep customers happy by quickly handling restocks and checkout rush hours.

Unlock new licenses, expand your store layout, take on special tasks, and optimize your workflow to boost profits. Play solo or team up with up to 4 players in online co-op, where teamwork, coordination, and a bit of chaos turn your shop into a thriving entertainment megastore.
70010000108110.intro: Build the ultimate nerd paradise! Sell games, manga, and toys, manage the rush, and work together with friends in chaotic co-op to turn a tiny shop into a weeb megastore.
70010000108110.name: Weeb Store Simulator: Supermarket Together

70010000116803.description:
Slime your way though this platforming adventure about a brave little slime in a vast magical kingdom.

The evil menace known as Lord Old Skull has been freed, and now our colorful family of slimes must heed the call of heroism. Customize your slime, journey through diverse biomes, battle powerful bosses, and discover alternative branching paths in this slime-sized action quest.

Choose your level of challenge while gaining items, building experience, and enjoying immersive retro graphics and sounds.


Features
* Platform action gameplay with alternate paths
* Customize your slime
* Explore 4 diverse biomes 
* Battle 4 epic bosses
* Gain items and experience
* Retro game visual and sound aesthetics
70010000116803.intro: This adventurous slime is ready to become a legendary hero
70010000116803.name: Adventurous Slime

70010000118571.description:
Between freezing waters and mysterious depths, dive ever deeper in search of rare fish and the unknown. By selling its catches, the penguin unlocks upgrades, equipment, and access to deeper areas.

Collect all 42 Arctic monsters to complete your ARCTICDEX.

Gameplay Features

● 2D platformer with vertical exploration. Control an explorer penguin that progressively descends through underwater environments, combining precise platforming with exploration.

● Capture and economy system. Catch different species of fish and sell your catches to earn money and invest in upgrades.

● Upgrades and equipment. Improve your abilities to reach previously inaccessible areas.

● Charming pixel art visual style. Appealing 2D art, expressive characters, and environments that visually evolve as you progress.

● Relaxing atmosphere with a constant sense of discovery. A cozy experience filled with curiosity and mystery, perfect for players who enjoy exploring at your own pace.
70010000118571.intro:
Fish, sell, upgrade, and dive deeper and deeper into an ocean full of secrets.
Collect the entire ARCTICDEX!
70010000118571.name: Penguin

70010000119688.description:
Experience the sun-drenched beauty of Southern Spain from the comfort of your home. Jigsaw Puzzle Passport: Spain invites you to a relaxing, visual journey, featuring breathtaking high-definition photography.

High-Definition Travel
Forget generic illustrations—immerse yourself in 15 hand-curated levels featuring real-world photography. 

Game Highlights:
>Authentic Scenery: 15 massive, high-resolution puzzles showcasing real locations in Southern Spain.
>Relaxing Atmosphere: No timers, no stress. Just you, the music, and the beautiful scenery.
>Intuitive Controls: Smooth "drag-and-drop" with seamless touchscreen mechanics designed for both casual players and puzzle enthusiasts.
>Save and Load system to track which levels you've already completed!
70010000119688.name: Jigsaw Puzzle Passport: Spain

70070000030830.description:
Pre-order to receive a Gold Choice Pack and Early Access on March 13, 2026.

This edition of MLB The Show 26 includes: 
• MLB® The Show™ 26
• 20 The Show Packs
• 2 World Baseball Classic Choice Packs
• 1 Legend Choice Pack
• 1 World Baseball Classic Uniform Pack
• 1 Equipment Pack
• Double Daily Rewards
• 1 Cover Athlete Bat Skin Pack
• 20K Stubs™

Step up and take control of how you leave your mark in the most immersive MLB® The Show™ yet. 

Discover new Road To The Show mechanics, deeper Franchise experiences, enhanced customization options, and true-to-life on-field action.

Road To The Show
NEW – Road to Cooperstown & Expanded Amateur Years Career
Your journey to greatness starts here, which path will you choose?
Earn a coveted spot at the MLB Draft Combine® or catch the eye of one of 11 additional new colleges as you advance through chapters of your career.
Compete in the officially licensed Men’s NCAA® College World Series® as you rise from a promising high school talent to one of the all-time MLB® greats – immortalized in the National Baseball Hall of Fame and maybe even a place on the first ballot.

Diamond Dynasty¹
Unmissable Updates
Build your ultimate fantasy team with a new Red Diamond rarity tier and World Baseball Classic player cards featuring elite game-changing players.
Play revamped Mini-Seasons campaigns as you level up your stars with an upgraded PXP system, customize their skills with Parallel Mods, and hit Parallel V faster through special challenges.

Franchise 
NEW – Revamped Front Office Experience
Play the nail-biting key matches and moments of your Franchise GM career with streamlined seasons and Custom Game Entry. Track rumours and strike big deals in the ultimate all-in-one Trade HUB, where a new Trade Logic System delivers real depth, immersion, and high-stakes decision-making. Smarter lineups and improved player regression now mirror the real decisions and realities that shape your organization’s future.

Storyline¹
The Negro Leagues Season 4
The award-winning game mode returns with all-new legends, uniforms, and stadiums – celebrating the stories of some of the most important yet often forgotten ballplayers in history.

Gameplay Updates – More Control Than Ever
Bear Down Pitching: exert total control over your pitches by earning a limited supply of elite focus to deploy in the most critical moments.

Big Zone Hitting: rack up the home runs with more control over your swing placement, giving you a better chance to nail that sweet spot.

¹Internet connection required.
70070000030830.intro: Make your mark. Become a Legend. Own The Show™.
70070000030830.name: MLB® The Show™ 26 - Digital Deluxe Edition

70070000034402.description:
Immerse yourself in the world of bowling with Bowling Fever!

Test your skills in countless game modes, visit amazingly realistic 3D locations, play fantastic mini-games and discover dozens of new bowling balls and pins!

Need a hand? Various power-ups and boosts will help you to meet the challenges.

A bowling game has never been this exciting!

- Fantastic bowling alleys from around the world.
- Fantastic 20+ balls, pins and lanes to show off!
- Multiple mini-games to complete.
- Multiple game modes to play!

This bundle includes base game, expansion pack #1, expansion pack #2, expansion pack #3, expansion pack #4 and expansion pack #5 with:

-50 new bowling ball styles
70070000034402.intro: Fire up "Bowling Fever" and be carried away by the emotions!
70070000034402.name: Bowling Fever Full Edition

70070000034405.description:
Push Beyond Limits – Rule the Race!

Get ready for the next generation of speed in Formula Racing Pro 2026! Experience the ultimate adrenaline rush as you take on faster cars, smarter rivals, and brand-new circuits inspired by the world’s most iconic tracks.

With enhanced graphics, improved physics, and dynamic weather, every lap feels more real than ever. Master your racing line, react to changing track conditions, and fight for the top spot in intense head-to-head battles.

Whether you’re a seasoned pro or just starting out, Formula Racing Pro 2026 delivers pure racing excitement — accessible, fast, and endlessly thrilling!

Tune your car, chase the podium, and prove you’re the fastest driver on the grid. The future of racing starts now!

This bundle includes base game and expansion pack #3 with:

This pack introduces three stunning new liveries for your race cars, adding style and personality to your high-speed adventures.
70070000034405.intro: Push Beyond Limits – The Future of Racing Starts Now!
70070000034405.name: Formula Racing Pro 2026 Premium Edition

70070000034411.description:
Racers, beware! 

Fast-paced, polished and dynamic motorbike racing now on Nintendo Switch™!

One of a kind game entirely playable with... Toy-Con Motorbike!

Forget about speed limits and traffic rules 'cause on this road you're the boss!

A unique mix of endless and arcade racing game featuring countless hours of fun!

IN MOTO RUSH GT YOU WILL FIND:

• Over 100 levels to beat!
• Endless racing experience
• 12 customizable motorbikes
• Toy-Con Motorbike support
• Race against time, ghost opponents or try various challenges! 
• Motion Controls – play by rotating your console!
• Play with the Nintendo Switch™ Pro Controller
• Support all play styles - TV Mode, Tabletop Mode, Handheld Mode, Toy-Con Motorbike
• Experience 4 different game modes 
• Weather and day-cycle effects: rain, night, storm! 
• Experience beautifully designed roads around the world

This bundle includes base game, Expansion Pack and Grip Collection #4 with:

- 4 new motorbikes (each with special colors)
- New colors for the rest of motorbikes
- New colors for gloves
- Special, Golden colors for motorbikes
- 4 pairs of state-of-the-art racing gloves, crafted for the ultimate grip and control.
70070000034411.intro: Ultimate motorbike racing experience for all ages!
70070000034411.name: Moto Rush GT Exclusive Edition

70070000034422.description:
In S.N.I.P.E.R.: Hunter Scope you will shoot, you will fight, and you will win!

Play S.N.I.P.E.R., the latest sniping game where you aim, fight and destroy virtual enemies. Try different types of missions, inspired both by classic rail shooters and modern cover shooters. Fight your way out during day and night, destroy evil forces and unlock new weapons and power-ups.

Game includes:
15+ STAGES
30+ WEAPONS
30+ GALLERY ITEMS
60+ SPECIAL ACHIEVEMENTS 

Become a hunter, mount your scope, and fight for our freedom!

This bundle includes base game, Neon Strike and Expansion Pack #2 with:

SHG-12-AQA: an aquatic-themed shotgun, with a blast like an ocean wave
UZ-90-CLD: a frosty Uzi, delivering a cool demise
SN-1200-NEO: a sniper rifle straight out of a neon dream, precision only matched by its glowing elegance.
- FMS-1-G rifle
70070000034422.name: S.N.I.P.E.R. - Hunter Scope Core Edition

70070000034446.description:
Cook tons of delicious meals from all over the world and become the best chef in the city!

Cook hundreds of tasty dishes with all the possible kitchen appliances and countless ingredients! 
Try it all: coffee makers, juice machines, pizza ovens, frying pans, fryers and ice cream machines. 

Upgrade and decorate your restaurants to attract more clients. 

Upgrade your kitchen appliances and ingredients to cook tasty dishes faster and earn more money!

This comprehensive collection includes three great cooking games: Food Truck Tycoon, Burger Chef Tycoon and Pizza Bar Tycoon!

Features:
* More than 100 dishes to serve 
* 3 unique locations
* More than 200 levels to explore
* Countless upgrades
* Unlock new items to upgrade your kitchen appliances, interiors and ingredients
* 100+ achievements to gain

This bundle includes Cooking Tycoons - 3 in 1 Bundle and Pizza Bar Tycoon New Levels #2 with:

- 20 brand new levels for Pizza Bar Tycoon
70070000034446.intro: A series of great cooking games in one brand-new collection!
70070000034446.name: Cooking Tycoons - 3 in 1 Bundle Deluxe Edition

70070000034448.description:
Get ready to test your aim and precision in Darts Fever, the ultimate darts game experience!

Take on classic and exciting game modes like 201, 301, 501, Cricket, and Around the Clock. Whether you're sharpening your solo skills or challenging up to 3 friends in local multiplayer, Darts Fever delivers non-stop dart-throwing fun. 

An innovative aim mechanic and stunning 3D graphics make every game an authentic dart-throwing experience. And with motion-controlled Joy-Con™ support, you can truly feel the action as you throw your darts with realistic movement, just like you’re playing in a real-life pub match!

Grab your darts, take aim, and hit the bullseye!

6 unique board designs
10 custom dart styles
5 game modes
Single-player or up to 4 players multi-player
Motion control Joy-Con support
Realistic 3d Graphics and throwing mechanic

This bundle includes base game and Stylish Precision #4 with:

5 brand-new dart designs
70070000034448.intro: Step Up to the toe line!
70070000034448.name: Darts Fever Upgrade Edition

70070000034450.description:
Discover the perfect balance of strategy and skill in Snooker Fever.  This game brings the classic snooker experience to the Nintendo Switch™, whether you're a seasoned snooker player or just picking up a cue for the first time.

With 10 beautifully crafted tables, customizable cues, and CPU opponents that keep you on your toes, every game feels fresh. Take on the challenge solo or invite a friend for some local competition. Focus on sinking that perfect shot, while the stunning 3D visuals capture the atmosphere of a real snooker hall.

Snooker Fever has all the tools you need to master the game, enjoy some friendly competition, and just have a great time.

Key Features:

10 different tables 
15 custom cues 
3 levels of opponents
Local multiplayer 
Smooth controls and realistic 3D graphics

This bundle includes base game, Expansion Pack #2 and Expansion Pack #4 with:

- 10 stunning new table designs
- 10 sleek cue styles
70070000034450.intro: The classic pool experience, right at home!
70070000034450.name: Snooker Fever Value Edition

70070000034453.description:
Football Legends 2025 brings the thrill of the world’s most popular sport to your Nintendo Switch™!

Step onto the pitch and experience pure football excitement across multiple game modes and stadiums.

Play a Quick Match for instant action — perfect for a fast-paced challenge alone or with friends in local multiplayer.

Want more control? Choose the Single Match mode to select your favorite team, stadium, weather, and time of day — and compete head-to-head with friends or AI opponents.

Take on the ultimate challenge in Tournament Mode, where 16 elite teams battle for glory. Only the best can lift the trophy!

Multiple stadiums, each offering customizable weather conditions — from sunny afternoons to rainy nights under the floodlights.

Get ready to kick off, score spectacular goals, and become a true Football Legend!

This bundle includes the base game and Team Pack #3 with:
- three new teams
70070000034453.intro: Play. Score. Win. Become a Football Legend!
70070000034453.name: Football Legends 2025 Premium Edition

70070000034454.description:
Get behind the wheel in Motorbikes Pro 2025 and experience the excitement of high-speed racing! With stunning graphics and intuitive controls, this game is perfect for racers of all ages. 

This thrilling racing game puts you right in the driver’s seat of fast-paced Motorbikes racing action.  Feel the rush as you speed through corners, overtake opponents, and navigate each twist and turn of the track with precision.  Accessible, fun, and incredibly addictive!

Choose your car, perfect your timing, and race your way to glory. The track is calling, and the thrill of victory is just one race away!

This bundle includes base game, expansion pack #2 and expansion pack #3 with:

-2 sets of premium skins for motorbikes
70070000034454.intro: Feel the Speed, Own the Track!
70070000034454.name: Motorbikes Pro 2025 Platinium Edition

70070000034457.description:
Pool Fever brings the classic game right to your Nintendo Switch™, perfect for beginners and pool sharks alike! 

Pool Fever offers a fun, accessible, and realistic billiards experience. With stunning 3D graphics and intuitive gameplay, you’ll feel like you’re playing in your favorite bar or pool hall. Whether you want to play in solo mode or challenge a friend in 2-player local multiplayer – either way, the table is set for hours of entertainment.

Choose from 10 different table designs, 15 unique cues, and 5 custom cue balls to create your perfect game setup. With three difficulty levels, you'll always have a challenge no matter your skill level.

So, chalk your cue, line up your shot, and sink the 8-ball - it’s game time!

Features:

10 different table designs 
15 unique cues sticks
5 custom cue balls 
3 difficulty levels
Play solo or in 2-player local multiplayer
Realistic 3D graphics

This bundle includes base game, expansion pack #2 and expansion pack #3 with:

- 5 new pool table designs
- 5 new pool cues designs
70070000034457.intro: The classic pool experience, right at home!
70070000034457.name: Pool Fever Platinium Edition

70070000034460.description:
Feel the Speed. Rule the Streets.

Step into the world of high-octane drag racing, where every millisecond counts and every gear shift can decide your fate.

Welcome to a vibrant metropolis bursting with neon lights, roaring engines, and pure adrenaline.

Test your reflexes and precision in intense straight-line races across ¼ mile, ½ mile, or full-mile tracks — both by day and under the dazzling glow of city nights.

Upgrade, tune, and customise more than 60 unique cars to dominate your rivals. Boost your engine, fine-tune your gearbox, unleash the nitro, and leave your opponents in a trail of smoke and shattered pride.

Shift. Launch. Win.

Every second counts. Every victory matters.
Feel the rush of nitro, the thrill of precision, and the glory of crossing the finish line first.

It’s not just a race — it’s a lifestyle.

This bundle includes the base game, Nightfall Boost and Sunrise Burnout with:
- new track bathed in morning light
- new track soaked in sunset
70070000034460.intro: Feel the speed, master the nitro, and rule the streets!
70070000034460.name: Nitrous Fury Complete Edition

70070000034464.description:
Love cooking games? Manage 9 distinct kitchens, craft over 500 dishes, and rise to culinary stardom across 1000+ fast-paced levels in Restaurant Tycoon: My Cooking Empire. Customize your home, unlock trophies, and bring the heat!

From street food to sushi, each kitchen will test your time-management skills as you work to satisfy impatient customers and hit your goals. But it’s not all about the kitchens—customize and upgrade your home to showcase your achievements, unlock trophies, and build a true empire!

Perfect for players of all ages, this game offers fast-paced fun that’s easy to pick up, but tough to master. Can you handle the heat and build your own cooking empire?

Key Features:

9 Unique Cuisines: Master a range of cooking styles and menus.
500+ Dishes: A global selection of recipes to perfect.
1000+ Levels: Challenge yourself with increasingly complex kitchens.
Home Customization: Upgrade your furniture and earn trophies to showcase your progress.
Fun & Fast-Paced: Simple to play, with endless hours of culinary excitement!

This bundle contains base game, DLC#3- Creative Desk and Restaurant Tycoon: My Cooking Empire - Kebab Bar Tycoon, with:

- an elegant desk, a comfortable chair, and other accessories that let you create your dream office!
- whole additional restaurant - Kebab Bar
70070000034464.intro: Universe bursting with flavors and culinary adventures awaits!
70070000034464.name: Restaurant Tycoon: My Cooking Empire - Platinium Edition

70010000117391.description:
Welcome to Sand Seeker, an exploration adventure set in an ancient desert city on the edge of the pyramids.

Roam sunlit streets, sandstone buildings, hidden alleys, and open desert paths as the great pyramids loom in the distance. Search for lost locations scattered throughout the city and surrounding sands. Every corner tells a story shaped by time, sand, and history.

Sand Seeker focuses on atmospheric exploration — no rush, no pressure — just discovery in a timeless desert world.

Features:

>Ancient Egyptian-inspired city environment

>Search-and-find exploration gameplay

>Hidden secrets to uncover

>Immersive desert atmosphere
70010000117391.intro: Walk the ancient paths. Seek what was lost.
70010000117391.name: Sand Seeker

70010000098722.description:
This story revolves around the frog-hopping tactical battler Frogtime. Collect, buy and trade frogs and use them to build an unbeatable roster.

Embark on a quest to defeat the local bully, and get sidetracked – play music, infiltrate a beehive (disguised as a bee), and maybe get in a sled race with a vampire.

Fully voice acted by us and our friends but also features a number of surprising special guests.

Grab your toadbag, count those cocoduds, and explore a gently absurd world where everything is resolved with frog battles.

Features:
- a bear in a frog onesie
- a giant skeleton man
- a normal sized skeleton man
- at least 12 heartfelt moments about the importance of community and what it means to have self-worth
- you can put hats on the frogs :3
70010000098722.intro: Bonnie Bear Saves Frogtime is a frog-obsessed comedy adventure featuring tactical frog battles, bizarre quests, and the mother of all frogs: the motherfrogger.
70010000098722.name: Bonnie Bear Saves Frogtime

70010000099939.description:
Pre-order to get the Gold Choice pack. 

This edition of MLB The Show 26 includes:
 • 5 The Show Packs

70010000099939.intro: Make your mark. Become a Legend. Own The Show™.
70010000099939.name: MLB® The Show™ 26

70010000111817.description:
“Without a doubt one of the best puzzle games I’ve ever played.”
IGN

“One of the very best puzzle games of the year, if not the decade.”
PC Gamer 

Opus Magnum: Complete Edition is the latest open-ended puzzle game from Zachtronics, the creators of SpaceChem, Infinifactory, TIS-100, and SHENZHEN I/O. Includes both Opus Magnum and the brand-new De Re Metallica expansion.

Master the intricate, physical machinery of the transmutation engine— the alchemical engineer’s most advanced tool— and use it to create vital remedies, precious gemstones, deadly weapons, and more.

Hailed as the most promising alchemist of his generation, Anataeus Vaya has just accepted a position as Head Alchemist of House Van Tassen, the oldest and richest of the city’s ancient Houses. But dangers lurk behind the family’s opulent facade, and alchemy alone may not solve every problem.


Design Machines - Design and build machines that carry out alchemical processes using a variety of components including programmable arms, customizable tracks, and more esoteric devices like Van Berlo’s wheel and the Glyph of Animismus.

Open-Ended Puzzles - Compete against your friends and the world to build the simplest, fastest, and most compact solutions to the game’s challenges. 

Rich Story - Intrigues and dark plots swirl around the city’s ancient Houses. Alchemists, who hold the power to create almost anything known to science, are highly sought— and highly dangerous.

Solitaire Minigame - Alchemical engineering takes focus and concentration. Take a break with Sigmar’s Garden, an original alchemy-based solitaire game. Every game is winnable, but not every game will be won…
De Re Metallica – An expansive prequel to Opus Magnum that includes 3 new glyphs, 17 new puzzles, and a new solitaire variant called “House Colvan.”
70010000111817.name: Opus Magnum: Complete Edition

70050000062653.description: This bonus content for MLB The Show 26 includes 15 The Show Packs, 2 World Baseball Classic Choice Packs, 1 Legend Choice Pack, 1 World Baseball Classic Uniform Choice Pack, Double Daily Rewards, 1 Cover Athlete Bat Skin Pack, and 20,000 Stubs™. Once acquired, items should be redeemed upon booting the game.
70050000062653.intro: Make your mark. Become a Legend. Own The Show™.
70050000062653.name: Digital Deluxe Edition Bonus Content

70070000034397.description:
This bundle of games will give you a taste of the excitement of opening a shop in your town and expanding your business worldwide. Attract like-minded individuals and help them discover something unique! Create an iconic meeting place for your friends! 

Check 3 amazing games in one pack
- Trading Card Shop Simulator
- Collectible Cars Shop Simulator
- Retro Geek Shop Simulator

Expand and upgrade your stores. Transform all spaces into a stylish haven for clients and embrace your inner perfectionist. 

Arrange the shops and add new features so that everyone can find what they are looking for. Create designated areas for buying, trading and playing.   

Add smart features to make shopping easier and help you stay organised. 

Search for hidden gems and sell them to eager customers. Find rare items to complete your collection! 

Act like a real entrepreneur!
- Keep your inventory fresh and exciting by stocking up on goods.
- Set your prices to strike the right balance between profit and demand. Will you aim for high profit margins, or attract more customers with discounts?
- You decide when to open your shop and when to restock.
- Build your reputation — remember that customer reviews shape your success! Keep your customers happy and watch your shop grow.
- Customise your store with posters, shelves, and eye-catching displays to make it your own.
- Some products are particularly special — if you can get hold of them, you can sell them at a huge profit!

Can you turn your small shop into the ultimate shopping haven? Prepare to manage, sell and grow in these amazing shopping simulators!
70070000034397.intro: Can you turn your small shop into the ultimate shopping haven? Prepare to manage, sell and grow in these amazing shopping simulators!
70070000034397.name: Shop Simulator Collection Bundle: Trading Card & Collectible Cars & Retro Geek

70010000095062.description: Northern Bear is crawling with penguins! The Emperor Penguin is moving his minions north of the arctic circle, and it’s up to Walnut the Walrus and Noklas the Narwhal to freeze them in their tracks! Use Walnut’s Walrus Wind to freeze penguins into ice-blocks. Use the ice-blocks to build new paths, stairs, and bridges! This simple concept is the foundation of a whole adventure of puzzling predicaments.
70010000095062.name: Let's Freeze Some Penguins

70010000103666.description:
Where did gorillas come from? What are gorillas? Where are gorillas going? A single-player game of gorillas— That is GORITIA! Fill the jungle with gorillas!

Expand the gorilla habitat by growing the troop while ensuring a steady supply of bananas. To achieve victory, seven or more gorillas must be aligned on the ground. However, if any gorilla is left without food, defeat follows—marking the total collapse of the troop.
70010000103666.intro:
Growing the gorilla troop.
A single-player card game.
No more bananas—the end.
70010000103666.name: Goritaire

70010000112212.description:
DigDigDrill is a mining, ore-collecting, and drill-customization simulation game where you carve out the underground world step-by-step at your own pace.

Dig, collect, and grow stronger. This is the definitive edition of "steady progress" mining that you won't be able to put down!
Use the resources you gather to create your very own original drill.
Let's dig deep into a cozy world with no enemies and no time limits!

<<< DigDigDrill Features >>>
- Mindless fun with mining and treasure hunting
- Block-puzzle style forging to enhance your drill just the way you like it
- Equipment with various special effects for efficient digging
- Extra stages appear after clearing the game for even more fun!

◆ Steady Digging
Dig through the earth and collect ores and treasure chests. Your goal: Floor 999!
Once your bag is full, head back to the surface to drop off your haul.

◆ Puzzle x Forging
Craft new drills using the ores you've collected.
If you fit the ores into the blueprints just right, you might create the ultimate drill.

◆ Choose Your Gear
If you're lucky, your drill will gain special effects. Combine them wisely to boost your efficiency!
- Specialize in movement speed to transport resources to the surface quickly
- Power up your bombs to blast through large areas at once
The choice is yours!

◆ End-Game Content
High-difficulty stages await you after the main clear.
The treasures you'll find there are just as powerful!

<<< Recommended for people who: >>>
- Want to lose themselves in satisfying "grind" tasks
- Love grinning at a massive collection of items
- Enjoy theory-crafting builds in hack-and-slash games
- Are looking for a relaxing game to unwind
70010000112212.intro:
Dig, Build, and Grow Stronger
Relaxing ground mining and ore collection
Aim for B999 and beyond with your custom drill!
70010000112212.name: DigDigDrill

70010000116271.description:
The best part of delivering mail? You can open every single letter and look through everyone’s business! Whilst in the real world this is a crime, on Arralla Isle it’s perfectly acceptable, and even encouraged!

At the Arralla Isle Deliberry service, you'll have to solve where each letter goes through pictograms drawn on each envelope - and they're not always obvious!

Learn of the island residents' interpersonal problems through reading their mail - they will need your help to resolve them! Meet big booty cutie fruits like grouchy glassblowers, silly scientists, and deliver seriously creepy letters to an ominous house on a hill...

On Arralla Isle, there’s no rush. The pace is slow, like a lazy summer day, so you can relax while you play. Exploration is a treat in this beautiful Australian landscape.

Snap photos, kick over chessboard pieces, read about Arralla Isle's history, throw stuff, discover secrets. The island is your oyster. You can even call your mum!

There's plenty to do as a mail delivery turnip on Arralla Isle!
70010000116271.intro: Play as a turnip with a big juicy bum delivering mail to a cast of colourful characters on an Australian island. Get the mail where it needs to go by reading residents' letters!
70010000116271.name: Letters to Arralla

70010000096720.description: You run your own perfume store as the owner of a perfume store. A sudden accident has involved you in the investigation of your own resurrection from the dead. The truth gradually emerges  with three employees - a love affair about perfume.  Harvest the memories of your own heartbeat in the game!
70010000096720.intro: “Aroma Love Ready!” is a whimsical fantasy rom-com! Enjoy sweet romance wrapped in lighthearted comedy!
70010000096720.name: Aroma Love Ready!

70010000112455.description:
The ball is coming.
Scared of getting hit?

Now is the time to be brave.
Don’t look away.

Bend both elbows and catch it in front of your chest!

Amazing.
Yes, you can do it. You did it. You really did!
70010000112455.intro:
Hold the Joy-Con™ in both hands!
For kids who aren’t good at dodgeball.
And for adults who want to try it again after a long time.
70010000112455.name: Enter the Dodgeball

70010000114250.description:
Team up or go solo, unleash powerful upgrades, and conquer unique modes like Paint, Minefield, and Invisibility as you clear every foe and push to the next level. 

This is a fast-paced couch co-op action game for 1 to 4 players, built for old-school living room fun. Play solo or with friends, clear enemy-packed stages, and experiment with wild power-ups and game modes that keep every match fresh.

Battle through 30 different stages, each filled with enemies to wipe out before you can advance. Treasure chests scattered around the arena grant new abilities—boost your speed, increase your power, or even slip straight through walls to outsmart your opponents.

Whether you are teaming up or going head-to-head, the special modes change how you play: 

• Paint Mode – Shoot paint, teleport around the map or hide in plain sight to ambush your opponents
• Minefield Mode – Drop deadly mines and turn the arena into a trap-filled maze
• Invisibility Mode – Vanish from sight and rely on your instincts to survive and strike first
• Single-Player Mode – Take on mission-based challenges tailored for solo play

Perfect for quick sessions or long game nights, this offline multiplayer brawler keeps everyone shouting, laughing, and begging for “one more round.”

Feature List
• Couch co-op for 1–4 players – Play solo or with friends on the same screen.
• Offline multiplayer & single-player – No online required; just plug in and play.
• 4 unique game modes – Paint, Minefield, Invisibility, and mission-based Single-Player.
• 30 handcrafted stages – Battle through a wide variety of levels and layouts.
• Powerful pick-ups – Open treasure chests for speed boosts, power upgrades, and wall-passing abilities
70010000114250.intro: Grab your friends, hit the couch, and blast through 30 chaotic stages in this local co-op battle game for 1–4 players.
70010000114250.name: Blastoids

70010000117659.description:
Shuri, the people of the sky, became a messenger of the golden dragon of the king of the sky and headed for HestiaFort.

In HestiaFort, there is a Red Bird.

Together with Shuri, run through HestiaFort to meet the Red Bird.

In this game, you will avoid the red ball and aim for the blue circle.

Run and fly through stages to reach the goal.
70010000117659.intro: At the end of the blue sky that spreads out like the sea, HestiaFort
70010000117659.name: HestiaFort

70010000074146.description:
The year is 12,012. Multiquadrillionaire monopoly "GSSAI CO." has been in power of the universe for centuries after a world-ending bioweapon was unleashed onto the masses. And now? The solar system has been destroyed by unknown celestial forces. A weapons development program run by the Earth subsidiary of "GSSAI CO." is fast progressing. And the world's denizens are disappearing.

That is until one man screws up a game of pool.

HERO OF THE STARS AND THE SKY
● Use your tongue to lick enemies and objects as you make your way through open metroidvania-like areas, whilst collecting "Planet Bits" to help fix the solar system!

WELCOME TO RUBATO WORLD
● 5 compact, densely packed areas ranging from a huge sprawling bakery to the world's most poorly planned city. Uncover secrets and shortcuts in every corner of the world.

IF I COULD ONLY LOVE
● A strange, funny plot with a deep focus on humour and character writing. It gets silly. It gets serious. Really concerningly serious. Uh. Is the guy who made this game okay..?

BUT FIRST, LOVE YOURSELF
● To save the world, you must save yourself first. Find yourself again.
70010000074146.intro: RUBATO, an experimental, 2D physics-based take on the collect-a-thon genre!
70010000074146.name: RUBATO

70010000099823.description:
When tyranny takes control… someone has to pull the trigger. Machine Gun Fury is a bold revival of the classic arcade military shooter — no cover systems, no moral debates, just pure reflex-driven carnage. It’s you, your trigger finger, and a limited supply of grenades against entire armies. If you grew up blasting through classic arcade games, welcome back to the frontline, soldier.

Blast your way through enemy armies with nothing but sharp reflexes, heavy firepower, and a limited supply of grenades. Liberate 8 explosive regions packed with screen-filling bosses, relentless waves of enemies, and high-intensity run-and-gun action. 

Step into the boots of three unstoppable soldiers armed to the teeth and ready to bring tyranny to its knees:

- Gunner Jimbo – A walking assault division. Built for suppressive fire and zero compromise. If he stops shooting, something big is about to explode.
- Suzi Uzi – Fast, tactical, and merciless. She doesn’t waste bullets. She doesn’t miss. She doesn’t stop moving.
- Mini-Gun Floyd – The embodiment of sustained fire. When those barrels spin up, the battlefield becomes a memory.

Three warriors. One impossible mission. Infinite enemies.

Fight on foot or take control of heavily armed vehicles including tanks, boats, and combat buggies. Unleash a full arsenal of military-grade weaponry and trigger explosive chain reactions that turn enemy strongholds into rubble. If it moves — eliminate it.

- Fast-paced top-down and side-scrolling run-and-gun gameplay
- Full range of combat weaponry delivering large-scale destruction and huge body counts
- Authentic 8-bit pixel art powered by modern enhancements
- Destructible elements, screen shake, particle effects, and layered parallax backgrounds
- Explosive SID-inspired soundtrack that hits like an arcade cabinet turned up to max

Press Start. Pull the trigger. Feel the Fury.
70010000099823.intro: Dive into a bold arcade-inspired shooter with explosive 2D action!
70010000099823.name: Machine Gun Fury

70010000103247.description:
Rip through retro-futuristic Tokyo highways in a demonic pursuit of speed and power! Lane split through heavy traffic and dominate tracks filled with obstacles on an action-packed mission to overcome possession. Uncover the truth behind your curse through scattered collectible manga pages. Are you fast enough to outrun your demons? 

About This Game

Immerse yourself in Neo-Tokyo’s intense world of motorcycle racing. Clear levels at neck-breaking speeds and avoid hitting innocent commuters. 
After totaling your bike in a race, you stumble upon a demon-possessed engine in a junkyard that offers speeds and power you can’t refuse. Battle for freedom from possession and overcome the darkness!

KILLER SPEEDS

Combining the thrilling elements of a 3D runner, maneuver through fast-paced levels by performing wheelies, ducking, sliding, and jumping. Racers can also increase their maneuverability by adjusting their speed, accelerating and decelerating depending on the environment they face. 

Pop wheelies while accelerating to great speeds as you lane split and duck for precision steering. Avoid decapitation in rapidly changing track environments by sliding across asphalt while avoiding numerous barriers. Keep the adrenaline pumping as you launch yourself on ramps and weave through congested Tokyo streets. 

Collect Demonic Symbols And Unlock Manga 

Find Demonic Symbols scattered throughout 45 levels, including unlockables that can only be accessed by completing skill objectives in each level. 

Each level contains three skill objectives:
•	Finishing at a record-breaking time
•	Zero demolition, avoid colliding with high-speed traffic
•	Near misses: drive close enough to kiss cars without colliding 

Demonic Symbols claimed unlock chapters of manga, progressing you deeper into the unfolding story. 

45 Challenging Levels 

You’re thrown into a vibrant, futuristic Tokyo, packed with stunning visuals and expertly crafted tracks that push your limits with each new level unlocked. 

Each zone offers its own vibe. Drift through power plants, duck into collapsing tunnels as you test your skill, and break through windows as you shred through a neon-drenched shopping mall. Every environment is fast and unforgiving. 

Difficulty increases as you progress through levels. Later levels will push your skills to the edge. Hidden collectibles can be found throughout levels, easy to spot early on, but harder to find as you advance. Master the toughest paths to claim them all and keep the adrenaline pumping.
70010000103247.intro:
Rip through retro-futuristic Tokyo highways!
Lane split through heavy traffic and dominate tracks filled with obstacles on an action-packed mission to overcome possession.
70010000103247.name: Moto Rush Reborn

70010000106444.description:
Command An Army Of Ghosts  
Summon and control a legion of ghosts, banshees, gremlins, and more, each with unique abilities. Your ghoulish goons are more terrifying (and entertaining) than ever.  
 
Strategy Meets Supernatural  
Blend tactics, adventure, and resource management in a seamless gameplay loop set within a richly built paranormal world. 
 
Solve Mysteries, Unleash Horror 
Every haunting is a puzzle. Use spectral strategy and powers to uncover secrets, manipulate mortals, and complete objectives.  
 
Rediscover the Fear  
Ghost Master: Resurrection invites you to master the art of fear in a beautifully reimagined supernatural playground. The dead have risen... and they're under your control.
70010000106444.name: Ghost Master: Resurrection

70010000115402.description:
Step into the role of Takashi Hayato, a samurai turned ronin after the murder of his lord. Set in feudal Japan during the Sengoku era, the game follows a journey of revenge, honor, and difficult choices.
Master skill-based katana combat with light and heavy attacks, blocks, parries, counterattacks, and executions. Use stealth to strike from the shadows or face enemies head-on in intense duels. Archery supports combat, offering tactical options in battle.

Progress through story-driven levels set in villages, temples, mountain paths, and enemy strongholds. Your actions shape the Honor Karma System — follow the Path of Honor to gain survivability, or the Path of Blood to embrace raw power. Karma influences gameplay bonuses and determines the final ending.

Key Features

- Skill-based katana combat with light, heavy, parry, counter, and execution mechanics
- Stealth gameplay with detection, silent kills, and risk-reward encounters
- Archery support for tactical combat and positioning
- Atmospheric levels inspired by feudal Japan
- Cinematic boss duels that test timing, focus, and resolve
- A branching Honor Karma system that shapes gameplay and story outcomes

Your journey ends where honor, revenge, and destiny collide.
Only your choices will decide whether Takashi becomes a legendary warrior, a ruthless survivor, or a ronin lost to history.
70010000115402.intro: Fight with honor. Decide your fate.
70010000115402.name: Samurai Simulator: Kensei Warrior

70010000116617.description: Spy Guy is a brilliant detective who travels around the world looking for hidden clues. This time, he needs your help to find identical pairs! Can you help him?
70010000116617.intro: Can you find two identical hidden objects?
70010000116617.name: Spot the Spy Guy

70010000119666.description:
Build your legacy from the ground up! In Castle Factory Tycoon, you aren’t just a king—you’re an industrial mastermind. Transform a small plot of land into a sprawling, impenetrable fortress by mastering the art of the forge.

Forge. Sell. Expand.
Start your journey by purchasing your first Droppers. Watch as they churn out essential gear for the realm. From sturdy axes and shields to mystical glowing potions, every item created is gold in your pocket.

Massive Construction.
With over 160 unique upgrades and items to buy, your castle will never stop growing. You can even upgrade your upgraders!


Features:
>Rebirth System: Reached the top? Reset your progress to earn permanent money multipliers! Every rebirth makes your next empire grow faster and bigger.

>Auto-Save & Load: Your progress is safe with us. Build at your own pace—your kingdom will be waiting exactly where you left it.

>Stunning Visuals: Watch your empty lot evolve into a bustling medieval powerhouse.


Are you ready to claim your crown?
70010000119666.name: Castle Tycoon Simulator

70070000033110.description:
Terrorise the unsuspecting citizens of Gravenville across 11 fully reimagined locations, from eerie asylums and military compounds to chaotic frat houses and heavily guarded police stations. All included Core Edition. The Core Edition also features two brand-new DLCs included with the base game!

Command An Army Of Ghosts  
Summon and control a legion of ghosts, banshees, gremlins, and more, each with unique abilities. Your ghoulish goons are more terrifying (and entertaining) than ever.  
 
Strategy Meets Supernatural  
Blend tactics, adventure, and resource management in a seamless gameplay loop set within a richly built paranormal world. 
 
Solve Mysteries, Unleash Horror 
Every haunting is a puzzle. Use spectral strategy and powers to uncover secrets, manipulate mortals, and complete objectives.  
 
Rediscover the Fear  
Ghost Master: Resurrection invites you to master the art of fear in a beautifully reimagined supernatural playground. The dead have risen... and they're under your control.
70070000033110.name: Ghost Master: Resurrection Core Edition

70070000033980.description:
Cat Souls:

In Cat Souls, you will be playing as Ruby, an energetic cat with a strange ability. Like all cats, Ruby has more than one life, but not all of them can use their past souls as a platform.

Ruby and her friend went on an adventure and successfully found the mythical Hourglass of time! Sadly the end of that adventure is the beginning of a new one.

Enemies appeared out of nowhere, and our protagonists tried to run but… only Ruby managed to escape. But she still has 7 lives! Now is the time to rescue your friend and get the Hourglass of Time back!

Jump, avoid obstacles, use levers, and collect keys to reach the end of each level in time. The spikes will only take one of your lives, but be careful not to waste them all!


Features:
* 45 levels
* Fun soul game mechanic
* Different obstacles and enemies
* 6 different worlds
* 2D Platformer
* Cute pixel art


Bumballon:

Join Bumballon on this cute but frantic adventure spanning across an incredible world full of dangers!

Explore 7 unique worlds overflowing with beautifully animated graphics and retro game nostalgia. Overcome various perils to save Bumballon's magical kingdom and rescue the beautiful Princess Moon.

Each mistake becomes a lesson to overcome future obstacles in Bumballon’s tough but fun and rewarding journey.


Features:
* Beautiful animated graphics.
* Explore 7 worlds.
* 35 different levels.
* 5 unlockable skins.
* Variety of action mechanics.


Prisonela DX:
